roles.page.create_description: Add a new central admin role with specific permissions
roles.page.custom_roles_not_available: Custom roles are not available in your current plan.

roles.page.description: Manage roles and permissions for your team
roles.page.info: System roles (Owner, Admin, Member) are protected and cannot be deleted. You can create custom roles to define specific permission sets for your team.
roles.page.limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of custom roles allowed by your plan.
roles.page.no_permissions: No permissions assigned to this role.
roles.page.no_users: No users assigned to this role.
roles.page.permissions_granted: Permissions granted to users with this role
roles.page.title: Role Management
